heading: Returns as to interests in foreign partnerships
label: 6046A Returns as to interests in foreign partnerships
notes: Amendments1997—Subsec. (a). , inserted at end “Paragraphs (1) and (2) shall apply to any acquisition or disposition only if the United States person directly or indirectly holds at least a 10-percent interest in such partnership either before or after such acquisition or disposition, and paragraph (3) shall apply to any change only if the change is equivalent to at least a 10-percent interest in such partnership.”Pub. L. 105–34, § 1143(a)(1)Subsecs. (d), (e). , added subsec. (d) and redesignated former subsec. (d) as (e).Pub. L. 105–34, § 1143(a)(2)

Effective Date of 1997 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 97–248, title IV, § 407(b)96 Stat. 671Sept. 3, 1982“The amendments made by section 405 [enacting this section and amending ] shall apply with respect to acquisitions or dispositions of, or substantial changes in, interests in foreign partnerships occurring after the date of the enactment of this Act [].”section 6679 of this titleSept. 3, 1982

children.text: who acquires any interest in a foreign partnership,
who disposes of any portion of his interest in a foreign partnership, or
whose proportional interest in a foreign partnership changes substantially,

children.heading: Form and contents of return
children.label: b Form and contents of return
children.text: Any return required by subsection (a) shall be in such form and set forth such information as the Secretary shall by regulations prescribe.

children.heading: Time for filing return
children.label: c Time for filing return
children.text: Any return required by subsection (a) shall be filed on or before the 90th day (or on or before such later day as the Secretary may by regulations prescribe) after the day on which the United States person becomes liable to file such return.

children.heading: 10-percent interest
children.label: d 10-percent interest
children.text: For purposes of subsection (a), a 10-percent interest in a partnership is an interest described in section 6038(e)(3)(C).

children.heading: Cross reference
children.label: e Cross reference
children.text: For provisions relating to penalties for violations of this section, see sections 6679 and 7203.
